message:
fix(db): use open_sqlite_file_with_lock_retry instead of recovery opener for WAL checkpoint

The archive salvage path called open_sqlite_file_with_recovery to checkpoint
the WAL before reconstruction, but recovery mode can trigger schema
re-initialization which is inappropriate here — we just need to flush the
WAL. Switch to open_sqlite_file_with_lock_retry which opens the file
normally with busy-timeout retries, matching the intent of a simple
checkpoint-before-copy operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
